channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chinese Pink Floyd fan creates AI model rivaling Claude and ChatGPT at half the cost
item.description: Moonshot's Kimi K3 model matches U.S. competitors and worries Silicon Valley.

item.title: Trump's social media monetization seen as corruption or a bid to revive stock
item.description: The move may be both corrupt and an attempt to boost a falling stock price.

item.title: Two U.S. troops killed, one missing after Iran attack on Jordan base
item.description: 16 U.S. service members have died and over 430 have been wounded since the war began.

item.title: Citizens Bank ends ties with private prison companies, citing changed business conditions
item.description: CoreCivic and The GEO Group have served as government contractors under the Trump administration to operate immigration detention centers.
